message:
fix(lint): Resolve ruff lint errors across codebase

- Fix import sorting (I001) in multiple files
- Remove unused imports (F401) in conftest.py and other files
- Fix indentation error in ums_endpoints.py root_endpoint function
- Add future annotations import to ums_models.py for forward references
- Remove unused formatter_config variable in logging/formatter.py

Auto-fixed by ruff, manual fixes for indentation and forward refs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
